settings.heading: Order Trophies & Medals on WhatsApp
settings.subheading: The fastest way to order — WhatsApp us your requirement, get designs, proofs and a quote in chat, approve, and we deliver across India. No forms, no friction.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: The easiest way to order from Meru Trophy is WhatsApp (+91 78922 07252): send your occasion, quantity, material and date; we reply with designs, a quote and a proof, all in chat. Approve, pay, and we deliver pan-India.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.text: Most of our customers order entirely on WhatsApp. Send a quick message — occasion, quantity, material, engraving text and date — and our team replies with catalogue photos, matching past work, a quote and a digital proof, all in the same chat. You approve, pay a 50% advance, and we craft and dispatch. It's fast, documented and easy to share with your team.

settings.title: Everything in chat
settings.text: Designs, quote and proof without forms or email chains.

settings.title: Share with your team
settings.text: Forward the chat for quick internal approvals.

settings.title: Documented
settings.text: Your spec, proof and confirmation all in one thread.

settings.title: Message us
settings.text: WhatsApp +91 78922 07252 with occasion, quantity, material and date.

settings.title: Get designs & quote
settings.text: We reply with photos, past work and pricing.

settings.title: Approve a proof
settings.text: Confirm names, logos and layout on a digital mockup.

settings.title: Pay & receive
settings.text: 50% advance with GST invoice; we craft and deliver pan-India.

settings.question: What number do I message?
settings.answer: WhatsApp us on +91 78922 07252. Send your requirement and we'll take it from there.

settings.question: Can I get a quote on WhatsApp?
settings.answer: Yes — share quantity, material and engraving text and we'll quote, usually same day.

settings.question: Can you send design proofs in chat?
settings.answer: Yes — digital mockups for approval come right in the WhatsApp thread.

settings.question: Do you deliver after a WhatsApp order?
settings.answer: Yes — pan-India delivery with tracking, GST invoice included.

settings.heading: Ready to start?
settings.text: Message us your requirement and event date — we'll guide you through and quote, usually within the hour.
